nl_query: What is the average time between exam schedule creation and board creation?
failed_sql:
SELECT AVG(esc.created_at - b.created_at) AS average_time_difference
FROM exam_schedule_cache esc
JOIN board b ON esc.exam_id = b.exam_id
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): exam_schedule_cache.created_at, exam_schedule_cache.created_at. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
